notes.headline: NBA Play-In - East - 7th Place vs 8th Place

headlines.description: — Cole Anthony came off the bench with 26 points and six assists to lead the Orlando Magic to a 120-95 win over the Atlanta Hawks on Tuesday night in the first game of the Play-In Tournament.
headlines.shortLinkText: Anthony, Magic claim 7th seed with 120-95 win over Hawks in Play-In Tournament

events.name: Memphis Grizzlies at Golden State Warriors

notes.headline: NBA Play-In - West - 7th Place vs 8th Place

headlines.description: — Jimmy Butler and Stephen Curry threw their arms around each other and embraced.
headlines.shortLinkText: Butler, Curry lead Warriors past Grizzlies 121-116 to secure seventh seed in West playoffs
